metadata.description: Runs Playwright Tests in src/example.spec.ts in CI
Merges Playwright blob reports from atomized tasks to produce unified reports for the configured reporters.

options.command: pnpm exec nx watch --projects @ethio-connect/customer-portal-dashboard --includeDependentProjects -- pnpm exec nx build-deps @ethio-connect/customer-portal-dashboard

mkdir -p dist/containers/@ethio-connect/customer-portal-dashboard && docker buildx build --push --file apps/customer-portal/customer-portal-dashboard/Dockerfile --tag ${NX_DOCKER_REGISTRY:-ghcr.io}/${NX_DOCKER_REPOSITORY:-ethio-connect}/@ethio-connect/customer-portal-dashboard:${NX_IMAGE_TAG:-${NX_TASK_HASH:-latest}} --metadata-file dist/containers/@ethio-connect/customer-portal-dashboard/push-metadata.json apps/customer-portal/customer-portal-dashboard && DIGEST=$(python - <<'P'
import json
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('dist/containers/@ethio-connect/customer-portal-dashboard/push-metadata.json')
j=json.loads(p.read_text()) if p.exists() else {}
print(j.get('containerimage.digest',''))
P
) && printf "{\n  \"project\": \"@ethio-connect/customer-portal-dashboard\",\n  \"image\": \"%s/%s/@ethio-connect/customer-portal-dashboard:%s\",\n  \"digest\": \"%s\",\n  \"ref\": \"%s/%s/@ethio-connect/customer-portal-dashboard@%s\"\n}\n" "${NX_DOCKER_REGISTRY:-ghcr.io}" "${NX_DOCKER_REPOSITORY:-ethio-connect}" "${NX_IMAGE_TAG:-${NX_TASK_HASH:-latest}}" "$DIGEST" "${NX_DOCKER_REGISTRY:-ghcr.io}" "${NX_DOCKER_REPOSITORY:-ethio-connect}" "$DIGEST" > dist/containers/@ethio-connect/customer-portal-dashboard/image.json
